gist.headline: Hitting the digital books
gist.blurb: Someone built an interactive exam prep app for DDCET diploma students. Because studying is slightly less painful when the MCQs are served up fresh by AI.
gist.summary: Added DDCET.Trainer, an interactive multiple-choice exam prep app for diploma students, to the community showcase.
gist.impact: Users can now discover and use this community-built educational tool to prepare for their DDCET exams.
gist.visual_concept: Education/studying theme. The pollinations bee mascot (Polly) wearing tiny reading glasses, looking at a retro computer screen showing 'A, B, C' options. A cozy study desk with books and a lime green lamp.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny reading glasses, studying at a wooden desk. A retro computer monitor glows softly, displaying multiple choice options 'A B C'. A stack of pixelated books and a lime green (#ecf874) desk lamp illuminate the scene. Soft pastel lavender and cream gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley, emotionally warm.
